US_CPI_SHOCK_MAY_25.description: US CPI came in significantly hotter than expected, causing a major USD rally.

BOE_RATE_CUT_SEP_25.description: Bank of England unexpectedly cut interest rates by 50bps.

US_ELECTION_2020.description: Biden vs Trump. Delayed results caused extended chop and volatility.
